description.text: $\textit{Coulomb Per Kilogram (C/kg)}$ is the unit in the category of Exposure. It is also known as coulombs per kilogram, coulomb/kilogram. This unit is commonly used in the SI unit system. Coulomb Per Kilogram (C/kg) has a dimension of $M^{-1}TI$ where $M$ is mass, $T$ is time, and $I$ is electric current. This unit is the standard SI unit in this category.
